mapper.sql: t1.DEPT_NAME, t1.RESIDENCE_REASON, t1.TAIWAN_COMPATRIOTS, t1.FUL_SPECIALITY, t1.RESIDENCE_COUNTRY, t1.BIRTHDATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.PART_SPECIALITY, t1.NATION, t1.TAIWAN_RELATIVES, t1.DATA_1, t1.DATA_2, t1.GENDER, t1.DATA_3, t1.UF_IDENTITY, t1.HO_COMPATRIOTS, t1.DATA_4, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.PART_GRADUATION, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.FUL_EDUCATION, t1.HOST_COUNTRY, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.RELIGIOUS_BELIER, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.UFMNAME, t1.DATA_5, t1.EMPLOYEEID, t1.USER_TITLE, t1.DATA_6, t1.DATA_7, t1.DATA_8, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.RESIDENCE_YEAR, t1.PARTY_REPRE_POSITIONS, t1.DUTIES, t1.PO_NAME, t1.HO_DEPENDENTS, t1.RO_CHINESE, t1.NEMBER, t1.PART_EDUCATION, t1.FUL_GRADUATION, t1.POLITICAL_OUTLOOK, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.PHONE_NUMBER

if.test: bean.bpmType != null and bean.bpmType != '' and bean.bpmType == 'my'

sql.if: and exists (select 1 from BPM_CLIENT_HIST_TASK_V os where os.task_b_id_ = t1.id and os.assignee_ = #{bean.currUserId})

if.test: bean.bpmState != null and bean.bpmState != '' and bean.bpmState != 'all'

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_UFM_INFO_F t1 left join BPM_CLIENT_HIST_PROCINST_V v on t1.id = v.formid_

select
from DYN_UFM_INFO_F t1 left join sys_bpm_hist_procinst v on t1.id = v.formid_

select
from DYN_UFM_INFO_F t1 left join sys_bpm_hist_procinst v on t1.id = v.formid_
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_UFM_INFO_F
DEPT_NAME,
RESIDENCE_REASON,
TAIWAN_COMPATRIOTS,
FUL_SPECIALITY,
RESIDENCE_COUNTRY,
BIRTHDATE,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
PART_SPECIALITY,
NATION,
TAIWAN_RELATIVES,
DATA_1,
DATA_2,
GENDER,
DATA_3,
UF_IDENTITY,
HO_COMPATRIOTS,
DATA_4,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
PART_GRADUATION,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
FUL_EDUCATION,
HOST_COUNTRY,
CREATED_BY,
RELIGIOUS_BELIER,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
UFMNAME,
DATA_5,
EMPLOYEEID,
USER_TITLE,
DATA_6,
DATA_7,
DATA_8,
CREATION_DATE,
RESIDENCE_YEAR,
PARTY_REPRE_POSITIONS,
DUTIES,
PO_NAME,
HO_DEPENDENTS,
RO_CHINESE,
NEMBER,
PART_EDUCATION,
FUL_GRADUATION,
POLITICAL_OUTLOOK,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
PHONE_NUMBER,
#{deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{residenceReason,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{taiwanCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fulSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{residenceCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{birthdate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{partSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{taiwanRelatives,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data1,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{data2,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{gender,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ufIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{hoCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fulEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{hostCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{religiousBelier,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{ufmname,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{employeeid,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{residenceYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyReprePositions,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{duties,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{poName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{hoDependents,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{roChinese,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{nember,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fulGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{phoneNumber,jdbcType = DECIMAL},

insert into DYN_UFM_INFO_F( DEPT_NAME , RESIDENCE_REASON , TAIWAN_COMPATRIOTS , FUL_SPECIALITY , RESIDENCE_COUNTRY , BIRTHDATE , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , PART_SPECIALITY , NATION , TAIWAN_RELATIVES , DATA_1 , DATA_2 , GENDER , DATA_3 , UF_IDENTITY , HO_COMPATRIOTS , DATA_4 , ID , CREATED_DEPT , PART_GRADUATION , LAST_UPDATE_IP , FUL_EDUCATION , HOST_COUNTRY , CREATED_BY , RELIGIOUS_BELIER , LAST_UPDATED_BY , UFMNAME , DATA_5 , EMPLOYEEID , USER_TITLE , DATA_6 , DATA_7 , DATA_8 , CREATION_DATE , RESIDENCE_YEAR , PARTY_REPRE_POSITIONS , DUTIES , PO_NAME , HO_DEPENDENTS , RO_CHINESE , NEMBER , PART_EDUCATION , FUL_GRADUATION , POLITICAL_OUTLOOK , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY , PHONE_NUMBER )
select #{item.deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.residenceReason,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.taiwanCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fulSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.residenceCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.birthdate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.partSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.taiwanRelatives,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data1,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.data2,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.gender,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ufIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.hoCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fulEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.hostCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.religiousBelier,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.ufmname,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.employeeid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.residenceYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyReprePositions,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.duties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.poName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.hoDependents,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.roChinese,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.nember,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fulGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.phoneNumber,jdbcType = DECIMAL} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_UFM_INFO_F
DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
RESIDENCE_REASON = #{residenceReason,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TAIWAN_COMPATRIOTS = #{taiwanCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FUL_SPECIALITY = #{fulSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
RESIDENCE_COUNTRY = #{residenceCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BIRTHDATE = #{birthdate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
PART_SPECIALITY = #{partSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TAIWAN_RELATIVES = #{taiwanRelatives,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_1 = #{data1,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
DATA_2 = #{data2,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
GENDER = #{gender,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_3 = #{data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
UF_IDENTITY = #{ufIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
HO_COMPATRIOTS = #{hoCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_4 = #{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PART_GRADUATION = #{partGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FUL_EDUCATION = #{fulEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
HOST_COUNTRY = #{hostCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
RELIGIOUS_BELIER = #{religiousBelier,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
UFMNAME = #{ufmname,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_5 = #{data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
EMPLOYEEID = #{employeeid,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_TITLE = #{userTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_6 = #{data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_7 = #{data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DATA_8 = #{data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
RESIDENCE_YEAR = #{residenceYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_REPRE_POSITIONS = #{partyReprePositions,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DUTIES = #{duties,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PO_NAME = #{poName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
HO_DEPENDENTS = #{hoDependents,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
RO_CHINESE = #{roChinese,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
NEMBER = #{nember,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PART_EDUCATION = #{partEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FUL_GRADUATION = #{fulGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = #{politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PHONE_NUMBER = #{phoneNumber,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_UFM_INFO_F set DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , RESIDENCE_REASON = #{residenceReason,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TAIWAN_COMPATRIOTS = #{taiwanCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FUL_SPECIALITY = #{fulSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , RESIDENCE_COUNTRY = #{residenceCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDATE = #{birthdate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PART_SPECIALITY = #{partSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TAIWAN_RELATIVES = #{taiwanRelatives,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_1 = #{data1,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , DATA_2 = #{data2,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , GENDER = #{gender,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_3 = #{data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UF_IDENTITY = #{ufIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HO_COMPATRIOTS = #{hoCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_4 = #{data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PART_GRADUATION = #{partGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FUL_EDUCATION = #{fulEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOST_COUNTRY = #{hostCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , RELIGIOUS_BELIER = #{religiousBelier,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UFMNAME = #{ufmname,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_5 = #{data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EMPLOYEEID = #{employeeid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_TITLE = #{userTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_6 = #{data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_7 = #{data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_8 = #{data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , RESIDENCE_YEAR = #{residenceYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_REPRE_POSITIONS = #{partyReprePositions,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DUTIES = #{duties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PO_NAME = #{poName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HO_DEPENDENTS = #{hoDependents,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , RO_CHINESE = #{roChinese,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NEMBER = #{nember,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PART_EDUCATION = #{partEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FUL_GRADUATION = #{fulGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = #{politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PHONE_NUMBER = #{phoneNumber,jdbcType = DECIMAL} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_UFM_INFO_F set DEPT_NAME = #{item.deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , RESIDENCE_REASON = #{item.residenceReason,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TAIWAN_COMPATRIOTS = #{item.taiwanCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FUL_SPECIALITY = #{item.fulSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , RESIDENCE_COUNTRY = #{item.residenceCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDATE = #{item.birthdate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PART_SPECIALITY = #{item.partSpeciality,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NATION = #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TAIWAN_RELATIVES = #{item.taiwanRelatives,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_1 = #{item.data1,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , DATA_2 = #{item.data2,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , GENDER = #{item.gender,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_3 = #{item.data3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UF_IDENTITY = #{item.ufIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HO_COMPATRIOTS = #{item.hoCompatriots,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_4 = #{item.data4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PART_GRADUATION = #{item.partGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FUL_EDUCATION = #{item.fulEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HOST_COUNTRY = #{item.hostCountry,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , RELIGIOUS_BELIER = #{item.religiousBelier,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UFMNAME = #{item.ufmname,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_5 = #{item.data5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , EMPLOYEEID = #{item.employeeid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_TITLE = #{item.userTitle,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_6 = #{item.data6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_7 = #{item.data7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_8 = #{item.data8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , RESIDENCE_YEAR = #{item.residenceYear,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_REPRE_POSITIONS = #{item.partyReprePositions,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DUTIES = #{item.duties,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PO_NAME = #{item.poName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , HO_DEPENDENTS = #{item.hoDependents,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , RO_CHINESE = #{item.roChinese,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NEMBER = #{item.nember,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PART_EDUCATION = #{item.partEducation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FUL_GRADUATION = #{item.fulGraduation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POLITICAL_OUTLOOK = #{item.politicalOutlook,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PHONE_NUMBER = #{item.phoneNumber,jdbcType = DECIMAL} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
